meaning: n.鳍状肢,潜水用橡皮制鳍状肢,<俚>手
examples: The seal's flipper is homologous with the human arm.
Amazon dolphins bear little resemblance to our beloved Flipper.
The green sea turtle, could only swim around in a very limited range because she only had one flipper.
The 45-pound robot is agile, avoiding obstacles and climbing stairs using its front flipper.
An automatic hamburger flipper currently in development could replace low-wage line cooks at a beachside burger joint, for example.
